name: Uncle Buck's Currant Jelly Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Combine all ingredients except the butter in a stainless steel or enamel pan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes. (Do not let it burn; add a small amount of water if it cooks down too low.)
Strain the sauce into a clean pan. Add the butter. Simmer until the butter melts.
Stir with a wooden spoon until well mixed. Remove from heat.
Note: This sauce keeps well in your refrigerator. Do not freeze!
